narrative:
Beaverdam (precinct in Allen County) has 181 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.3 percentage points.
